Upload Excel files manually. Use these only when you need to load data from a local file instead of the live Supabase cloud source. Each upload replaces any previously loaded data for that category.
📂
Sales Data
DUROPLY.sales equivalent
Upload the Sales Excel export. The system will parse all 91+ columns including dates, amounts and product details.
💳
DIL Collection Data
DUROPLY.collections equivalent
Upload the customer-wise collection Excel with Posting Date and Total Collection columns.
📊
DIL Op. Balance Data
DUROPLY.opening_balance equivalent
Upload customer opening balance Excel. Used to calculate Outstanding = Op.Bal + Sales − Collection.
🎯
T.O.D. Master Data
DUROPLY.tod_master equivalent
Upload T.O.D. slab configuration (customer group × turnover slab → discount %). Download the template if you don't have one.
💡 Tip: The dashboard is configured to load data directly from Supabase by default. Use these manual Excel uploads only when working offline or when you need to test with a different dataset. After uploading, the sidebar status text will update with row counts and any data validation messages.
Connect this dashboard to your Supabase project. Once configured, the cloud-load buttons (☁) in the left sidebar will pull the live data straight from the DUROPLY schema instead of an Excel upload. Settings are saved in this browser only.
☁
Supabase Connection
Project: zzawutnztjfbdtvaohxm · Schema: DUROPLY

DUROPLY.opening_balance
First-time setup:
  1. Run the included Duroply_Supabase_Schema.sql in Supabase SQL Editor.
  2. In Supabase: Project Settings → API → Exposed Schemas → add DUROPLY.
  3. Copy your Project URL and anon public key from Project Settings → API.
  4. Paste above and click "Test & Save".
  5. Use the ☁ buttons in the left sidebar (or "Load All Data" above) to pull live data.
